title: Policies
subtitle: Formal, reusable rules for data access, usage, protection, and management.

permissions.deniedView: You do not have permission to view policies.
permissions.deniedCreate: You do not have permission to create policies.
permissions.deniedEdit: You do not have permission to edit policies.
permissions.deniedDelete: You do not have permission to delete policies.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Policy?
deleteDialog.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the policy and all its attachments.

emptyState.title: No policies defined yet
emptyState.description: Create your first policy to define reusable governance rules.
